description: Style NoteTurn up the heat this summer with this stylishly cut georgette top from arrow. Tie ups at the waist give you a beautifully feminine silhouette. Team it with beige fitted trousers and pop heels to give your outfit a stylish spin.Product DetailsTurquoise blue layered top with dark blue lining, round neck, sleeveless, tie ups at waist, accompanied with blue camisole, concealed side zipperMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine washDo not bleachCool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M Style NoteTurn up the heat this summer with this stylishly cut georgette top from Arrow.
